caption: Figure 21. Performance variation with ϵ for interpolation on the Brain Regeneration dataset.
description: Two line charts showing metric values across different epsilon values (log scale) from 10^-3 to 10^4. Subfigure (a) shows Next Step Sampling and subfigure (b) shows IVP Sampling. Both plots compare 'Wasserstein' and 'Weighted Wasserstein' metrics.
